babyDevelopment: Your baby is 'Full Term'! Their physical development is complete, though their brain continues to rapidly develop (and will outside the womb).
bodyChanges: Your water could break at any time. Contractions might start. You might feel a burst of energy (nesting) right before labor begins.
tips: Double-check your support system for older kids/pets
Stay open-minded about your birth plan

do: Call your provider when labor contractions hit the 5-1-1 rule
dont: Worry if you pass your due date
Eat a huge heavy meal if in labor

milestoneDescription: You've made it! Baby is full term and actively waiting for their perfect birthday.
